seo_meta_aciklama: A compilation filled with authentic hadiths explaining the importance of patience and reliance in Islam.
kategori_giris_yazisi: Patience and reliance are among the fundamental virtues of Islam, expressing the believers' trust and submission to Allah. Patience involves being steadfast in the face of difficulties and accepting Allah's decree, while reliance means leaving the outcome to Allah after making every effort. These two concepts enable believers to cope with the hardships they encounter in this worldly life and to attain happiness in the Hereafter. Islamic scholars have indicated that patience and reliance are deep indicators of faith that should take root in the hearts of believers. In this context, authentic hadiths teach us the significance of patience and reliance and how these virtues should be practiced.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّمَا الصَّبْرُ عِنْدَ الصَّدْمَةِ الأُولَى
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Patience is shown only at the first moment of shock.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: True patience is the reaction shown at the first moment of an event. Believers should be steadfast in the face of sudden occurrences.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ يَتَصَبَّرْ يُصَبِّرْهُ اللَّهُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Whoever strives to be patient, Allah will grant him patience.
hadisler.kaynak: Sahih al-Bukhari, The Book of Heart-Softening 20
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Patience can be attained through effort, and Allah does not leave this effort unrewarded.

hadisler.arapca: وَمَنْ يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Whoever relies upon Allah, He is sufficient for him.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Whoever trusts in Allah does not need anything else. Reliance attracts Allah's help.

hadisler.arapca: عَجَبًا لأَمْرِ المُؤْمِنِ، إِنَّ أَمْرَهُ كُلَّهُ خَيْرٌ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: How amazing is the affair of the believer! All of his affairs are good.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: The believer finds goodness in every situation they encounter; for they turn every circumstance to their advantage with patience and gratitude.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّ اللَّهَ مَعَ الصَّابِرِينَ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Indeed, Allah is with the patient.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Allah helps His patient servants and never leaves them alone.

seo_meta_aciklama: Discover the teachings of Islam on beautiful morality and ethics through authentic hadiths.
kategori_giris_yazisi:
Beautiful morality and ethics are one of the cornerstones of Islam, serving as an important principle that guides Muslims in their daily lives. Islam encourages individuals to act with beautiful morality and ethics while fulfilling their responsibilities towards both Allah and other people. This is not only an individual virtue but also plays a critical role in ensuring social peace and harmony.

Our Prophet (peace be upon him) has provided guidance to Muslims on this matter as the finest example of beautiful morality, encouraging them to embody such traits. The importance of beautiful morality and ethics is frequently emphasized in the hadiths, highlighting how crucial these virtues are for both worldly and eternal happiness. These hadiths serve as a guide for Muslims to direct their lives and strengthen their moral values.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّمَا بُعِثْتُ لِأُتَمِّمَ صَالِحَ الأَخْلاَقِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: I was only sent to perfect good character.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Our Prophet (peace be upon him) stated that his purpose of being sent was to perfect good character. This emphasizes the importance of morality in Islam.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الآخِرِ فَلْيَقُلْ خَيْرًا أَوْ لِيَصْمُتْ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should speak good or remain silent.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: We should be careful with our words, either speaking good or remaining silent. This shows the importance of controlling our tongue.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّ مِنْ خِيَارِكُمْ أَحْسَنَكُمْ أَخْلاَقًا
hadisler.turkce_anlam: The best among you is the one with the best character.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Beautiful morality is the most valuable trait of a Muslim. Enhancing our character increases our worth in the sight of Allah.

hadisler.arapca: لَيْسَ الشَّدِيدُ بِالصُّرَعَةِ، إِنَّمَا الشَّدِيدُ الَّذِي يَمْلِكُ نَفْسَهُ عِنْدَ الْغَضَبِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: The strong is not the one who overcomes others in wrestling, but the one who controls himself when angry.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Being able to control ourselves in moments of anger is a sign of true strength and beautiful morality.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ لَا يَرْحَمُ النَّاسَ لَا يَرْحَمُهُ اللَّهُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: He who does not show mercy to people, Allah will not show mercy to him.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Mercy is one of the cornerstones of beautiful morality. When we show mercy to others, we attain Allah's mercy.

seo_meta_aciklama: Discover the significance of prayer in Islam with concise information compiled from authentic hadiths about the virtues of prayer.
kategori_giris_yazisi: Prayer is one of the five fundamental pillars of Islam and an indispensable part of daily life for Muslims. It is one of the most important indicators of devotion and servitude to Allah. A person who prays draws closer to Allah, purifies their soul, and attains spiritual tranquility. Islamic scholars have stated that prayer is not only an individual act of worship but also a means of social solidarity and unity. There are many authentic hadiths regarding the virtues of prayer, which clearly demonstrate how significant prayer is for Muslims. These hadiths reveal the immense value of prayer in terms of personal development, social peace, and spiritual elevation.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ تَوَضَّأَ نَحْوَ وُضُوئِي هَذَا ثُمَّ صَلَّى رَكْعَتَيْنِ لَا يُحَدِّثُ فِيهِمَا نَفْسَهُ غُفِرَ لَهُ مَا تَقَدَّمَ مِنْ ذَنْبِهِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Whoever performs ablution like my ablution and prays two units of prayer without talking to themselves, their previous sins will be forgiven.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Prayer is an act of worship that leads to the forgiveness of sins. A sincerely performed prayer contributes to a person's spiritual purity.

hadisler.arapca: الصَّلَوَاتُ الْخَمْسُ وَالْجُمْعَةُ إِلَى الْجُمْعَةِ كَفَّارَةٌ لِمَا بَيْنَهُنَّ مَا لَمْ تُغْشَ الْكَبَائِرُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: The five daily prayers and one Friday prayer serve as expiation for what occurs between them, as long as major sins are avoided.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Prayer serves as a means for the forgiveness of minor sins. Regularly performed prayer cleanses and strengthens a person's spiritual life.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّ أَوَّلَ مَا يُحَاسَبُ بِهِ الْعَبْدُ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ مِنْ عَمَلِهِ صَلَاتُهُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: On the Day of Resurrection, the first deed for which a servant will be questioned is their prayer.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Prayer is the first act of worship to be questioned on the Day of Judgment. This emphasizes the central role and importance of prayer in Islam.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ حَافَظَ عَلَى الصَّلَوَاتِ كَانَتْ لَهُ نُورًا وَبُرْهَانًا وَنَجَاةً يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Whoever maintains their prayers will have light, evidence, and salvation on the Day of Resurrection.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Prayer is an act of worship that will lead to a person's salvation on the Day of Judgment. Regularly performed prayer illuminates a person's afterlife.

hadisler.arapca: الصَّلَاةُ نُورٌ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Prayer is light.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Prayer brings a spiritual light to a person's life. A person who regularly prays finds peace in both this world and the hereafter.

seo_meta_aciklama: Authentic hadiths related to the rights of parents emphasize the importance of respect and obedience to parents in Islam.
kategori_giris_yazisi: The rights of parents hold great significance in the Islamic faith. Parents are those who are instrumental in bringing their children into the world and invest considerable effort in their upbringing. Therefore, Islam commands respect for parents and good treatment towards them. The Qur'an and authentic hadiths frequently emphasize the importance of obedience to parents and treating them well. Our Prophet (peace be upon him) indicated that treating parents well is part of servitude to Allah and provided various recommendations to his community regarding this matter. The rights of parents encompass not only treating them well but also earning their approval and receiving their blessings. Thus, for Muslims, the rights of parents represent an important responsibility that should not be neglected.

hadisler.arapca: عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ: جَاءَ رَجُلٌ إِلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ﷺ فَقَالَ: يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ، مَنْ أَحَقُّ النَّاسِ بِحُسْنِ صَحَابَتِي؟ قَالَ: أُمُّكَ. قَالَ: ثُمَّ مَنْ؟ قَالَ: أُمُّكَ. قَالَ: ثُمَّ مَنْ؟ قَالَ: أُمُّكَ. قَالَ: ثُمَّ مَنْ؟ قَالَ: أَبُوكَ.
hadisler.turkce_anlam: It is narrated from Abu Huraira that a man came to the Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) and asked, 'O Messenger of Allah, who is most deserving of my good companionship?' He said, 'Your mother.' The man asked, 'Then who?' He said, 'Your mother.' The man asked again, 'Then who?' The Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said, 'Your mother.' The man asked once more, 'Then who?' He said, 'Your father.'
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: This hadith emphasizes the significant status of mothers in Islam and the importance of treating them well.

hadisler.arapca: عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ: رِضَا الرَّبِّ فِي رِضَا الْوَالِدِ، وَسَخَطُ الرَّبِّ فِي سَخَطِ الْوَالِدِ.
hadisler.turkce_anlam: It is narrated from Abdullah bin Amr that the Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said: 'The pleasure of the Lord is in the pleasure of the parent, and the displeasure of the Lord is in the displeasure of the parent.'
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: This hadith indicates that earning the pleasure of parents is equivalent to earning the pleasure of Allah.

hadisler.arapca: عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ قَالَ: لَا يَجْزِي وَلَدٌ وَالِدَهُ إِلَّا أَنْ يَجِدَهُ مَمْلُوكًا فَيَشْتَرِيَهُ فَيُعْتِقَهُ.
hadisler.turkce_anlam: It is narrated from Abu Huraira that the Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said: 'A child cannot repay his father’s rights unless he finds him as a slave and buys him to free him.'
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: This hadith expresses the immense rights parents have over their children and the difficulty of repaying those rights.

hadisler.arapca: عَنْ أَبِي الدَّرْدَاءِ قَالَ: سَمِعْتُ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ ﷺ يَقُولُ: الْوَالِدُ أَوْسَطُ أَبْوَابِ الْجَنَّةِ، فَإِنْ شِئْتَ فَأَضِعْ ذَلِكَ الْبَابَ أَوِ احْفَظْهُ.
hadisler.turkce_anlam: It is narrated from Abu Darda that the Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said: 'The father is the middle gate of Paradise. If you wish, then lose that gate, or preserve it.'
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: This hadith indicates that treating one’s father well is an important gateway on the path to Paradise.

hadisler.arapca: عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ: إِنَّ اللَّهَ يُوصِيكُمْ بِأُمَّهَاتِكُمْ، ثُمَّ يُوصِيكُمْ بِأُمَّهَاتِكُمْ، ثُمَّ يُوصِيكُمْ بِآبَائِكُمْ، ثُمَّ يُوصِيكُمْ بِالْأَقْرَبِ فَالْأَقْرَبِ.
hadisler.turkce_anlam: It is narrated from Abu Huraira that the Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said: 'Allah advises you to be good to your mothers, then to your mothers again, then to your fathers, and then to your closest relatives.'
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: This hadith emphasizes that treating parents and close relatives well is an advice from Allah.

seo_meta_aciklama: An in-depth look at the importance of repentance and seeking forgiveness in Islam through authentic hadiths, spiritual purification, and turning towards Allah.
kategori_giris_yazisi:
Repentance and seeking forgiveness is the process in Islam where believers turn to Allah to purify themselves from their sins and seek forgiveness. This process facilitates the individual's spiritual cleansing and the attainment of Allah's mercy. Islam acknowledges that every human can make mistakes and teaches that the door of repentance is always open. In this context, repentance and seeking forgiveness demonstrate the vastness of Allah's mercy and forgiveness, and the opportunity for humans to always return to the right path.

The noble hadiths present many examples emphasizing the importance and virtue of repentance and seeking forgiveness. These hadiths serve as a guide for believers to cleanse their hearts and turn towards Allah. A person who repents gains value in the sight of Allah and finds the opportunity to start anew by being purified from their sins. Therefore, repentance and seeking forgiveness are means of spiritual renewal and closeness to Allah in Islam.

hadisler.arapca: كُلُّ بَنِي آدَمَ خَطَّاءٌ وَخَيْرُ الْخَطَّائِينَ التَّوَّابُونَ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Every son of Adam makes mistakes, and the best of those who make mistakes are those who repent.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Humans can make mistakes; what matters is learning from them and repenting.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَبْسُطُ يَدَهُ بِاللَّيْلِ لِيَتُوبَ مُسِيءُ النَّهَارِ وَيَبْسُطُ يَدَهُ بِالنَّهَارِ لِيَتُوبَ مُسِيءُ اللَّيْلِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Allah extends His hand at night for the sinner of the day to repent; and He extends His hand during the day for the sinner of the night to repent.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Allah's mercy is vast, and the door of repentance is always open.

hadisler.arapca: وَالَّذِي نَفْسِي بِيَدِهِ لَوْ لَمْ تُذْنِبُوا لَذَهَبَ اللَّهُ بِكُمْ وَلَجَاءَ بِقَوْمٍ يُذْنِبُونَ فَيَسْتَغْفِرُونَ اللَّهَ فَيَغْفِرُ لَهُمْ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: By Him in Whose Hand is my soul, if you did not sin, Allah would sweep you away and bring forth a people who would sin and seek forgiveness from Allah, and He would forgive them.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Allah loves His repentant servants and is ready to forgive.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ تَابَ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَطْلُعَ الشَّمْسُ مِنْ مَغْرِبِهَا تَابَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: The repentance of one who repents before the sun rises from the west is accepted.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: There is an opportunity to repent before the signs of the Day of Judgment occur.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَفْرَحُ بِتَوْبَةِ عَبْدِهِ أَشَدَّ فَرَحٍ يَفْرَحُهُ أَحَدُكُمْ بِضَالَّتِهِ إِذَا وَجَدَهَا
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Allah rejoices at the repentance of His servant more than one of you rejoices at finding his lost camel.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Allah responds to His repentant servants with great joy.

seo_meta_aciklama: An examination compiled with authentic hadiths on the importance of halal sustenance and trade in Islam.
kategori_giris_yazisi: The Islamic religion advises individuals to pay attention to the concepts of halal and haram in every aspect of their lives. Earning halal sustenance and engaging in trade is an important part of the daily lives of Muslims. The sensitivity regarding this matter affects both the worldly and the hereafter life of a person. Halal earnings contribute to the acceptance of a person's worship and spiritual tranquility, while haram earnings can lead to the darkening of the heart and the rejection of worship. Therefore, honesty, justice, and the pursuit of halal earnings in trade are indispensable principles for Muslims. This compilation of hadiths reveals the place and importance of halal sustenance and trade in Islam through authentic sources.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّ اللَّهَ طَيِّبٌ لَا يَقْبَلُ إِلَّا طَيِّبًا
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Indeed, Allah is Good and accepts only that which is good.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Only that which is halal and pure is accepted by Allah. This indicates that we must pay attention to the halal nature of our earnings.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ غَشَّنَا فَلَيْسَ مِنَّا
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Whoever deceives us is not one of us.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Honesty is fundamental in trade. Deception is contrary to the moral values of Muslims and undermines social trust.

hadisler.arapca: الْبَيِّعَانِ بِالْخِيَارِ مَا لَمْ يَتَفَرَّقَا
hadisler.turkce_anlam: The buyer and seller have the option as long as they have not separated.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: It emphasizes that trade should be fair and transparent for both parties. The buyer and seller have the right to reconsider their decisions until an agreement is reached.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّ أَفْضَلَ الْكَسْبِ كَسْبُ يَدِ الرَّجُلِ إِذَا نَصَحَ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: The best earnings are those earned by a man's own hand when he is honest.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Earning through one's own labor and in an honest manner is considered the most valuable earning in Islam.

hadisler.arapca: التَّاجِرُ الصَّدُوقُ الْأَمِينُ مَعَ النَّبِيِّينَ وَالصِّدِّيقِينَ وَالشُّهَدَاءِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: The honest and trustworthy merchant is with the prophets, the truthful, and the martyrs.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Truthfulness and reliability in trade elevate a person to high spiritual ranks.

seo_meta_aciklama: Discover the importance of brotherhood and friendship in Islam through authentic hadiths.
kategori_giris_yazisi: Islam encourages the establishment of a strong bond of brotherhood and friendship among believers. This bond is not limited to blood relations but is built on faith and morality. Brotherhood and friendship enable Muslims to fulfill their responsibilities towards one another and strengthen social solidarity. Our Prophet (peace be upon him) frequently emphasized the importance of brotherhood and friendship in his authentic hadiths, advising believers to approach each other with love, compassion, and respect. In Islam, brotherhood and friendship are significant elements that affect not only worldly relationships but also the happiness of the Hereafter. By strengthening these bonds, Muslims can attain happiness in both this world and the Hereafter.

hadisler.arapca: لَا يُؤْمِنُ أَحَدُكُمْ حَتَّى يُحِبَّ لِأَخِيهِ مَا يُحِبُّ لِنَفْسِهِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: None of you truly believes until he loves for his brother what he loves for himself.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: True faith is measured by wanting for others what one wants for oneself in brotherhood and friendship.

hadisler.arapca: الْمُسْلِمُ أَخُو الْمُسْلِمِ لَا يَظْلِمُهُ وَلَا يُسْلِمُهُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: A Muslim is the brother of another Muslim; he does not oppress him nor does he hand him over to an enemy.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Brotherhood among Muslims means not wronging one another and not leaving each other in difficult situations.

hadisler.arapca: مَثَلُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ فِي تَوَادِّهِمْ وَتَرَاحُمِهِمْ وَتَعَاطُفِهِمْ مَثَلُ الْجَسَدِ إِذَا اشْتَكَى مِنْهُ عُضْوٌ تَدَاعَى لَهُ سَائِرُ الْجَسَدِ بِالسَّهَرِ وَالْحُمَّى
hadisler.turkce_anlam: The example of the believers in their mutual love, mercy, and compassion is like that of one body; when one limb aches, the whole body responds with sleeplessness and fever.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: The bond among believers should be like the organs of a body; when one suffers, the others should feel the same pain.

hadisler.arapca: لَا تَدْخُلُونَ الْجَنَّةَ حَتَّى تُؤْمِنُوا وَلَا تُؤْمِنُوا حَتَّى تَحَابُّوا
hadisler.turkce_anlam: You will not enter Paradise until you believe, and you will not believe until you love one another.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: The path to Paradise passes through a heart filled with faith and love; this is only possible through brotherhood and friendship.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ لَا يَرْحَمُ النَّاسَ لَا يَرْحَمُهُ اللَّهُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: He who does not show mercy to people will not be shown mercy by Allah.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Mercy is the foundation of brotherhood and friendship; we must show mercy to others to attain Allah's mercy.

seo_meta_aciklama: The rights of neighbors hold great importance in Islam. Treating neighbors well and safeguarding their rights are fundamental duties of Muslims.
kategori_giris_yazisi: The Islamic faith prioritizes justice and compassion in social relations. In this context, the rights of neighbors are one of the important issues in Islam. Neighbors are among the people frequently encountered in a Muslim's daily life, and establishing good relations with them is part of the beautiful morals recommended by Islam. Our Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him) encouraged treating neighbors well and emphasized the importance of safeguarding their rights. The rights of neighbors are not limited to establishing good relations but also include taking care of their needs and helping them. Our responsibilities towards neighbors play a significant role in ensuring social peace and tranquility.

hadisler.arapca: عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ: مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الْآخِرِ فَلَا يُؤْذِي جَارَهُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: It is narrated from Abu Huraira (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said: 'Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should not harm his neighbor.'
hadisler.kaynak: Sahih al-Bukhari, Book of Good Manners 18
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Not harming our neighbors is a requirement of our faith. We should always be good and kind to them.

hadisler.arapca: عَنْ عَائِشَةَ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهَا قَالَتْ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ: مَا زَالَ جِبْرِيلُ يُوصِينِي بِالْجَارِ حَتَّى ظَنَنْتُ أَنَّهُ سَيُوَرِّثُهُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: It is narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said: 'Gabriel continued to advise me about the neighbor until I thought he would make him an heir.'
hadisler.kaynak: Sahih al-Bukhari, Book of Good Manners 28
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Our responsibilities towards our neighbors are as important as our responsibilities towards our family members.

hadisler.arapca: عَنْ أَبِي ذَرٍّ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ قَالَ: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ ﷺ: يَا أَبَا ذَرٍّ إِذَا طَبَخْتَ مَرَقَةً فَأَكْثِرْ مَاءَهَا وَتَعَاهَدْ جِيرَانَكَ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: It is narrated from Abu Dharr (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Prophet (peace be upon him) said: 'O Abu Dharr! When you cook a broth, add plenty of water to it and take care of your neighbors.'
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Sharing with our neighbors shows our love and commitment to them. Helping each other in times of need is important.

hadisler.arapca: عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ: لَا يَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّةَ مَنْ لَا يَأْمَنُ جَارُهُ بَوَائِقَهُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: It is narrated from Abu Huraira (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said: 'He who does not feel secure from the harm of his neighbor will not enter Paradise.'
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Providing security to our neighbors is a sign of our faith. We must avoid causing them harm.

hadisler.arapca: عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ عَمْرٍو رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُمَا قَالَ: قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ﷺ: خَيْرُ الْأَصْحَابِ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى خَيْرُهُمْ لِصَاحِبِهِ وَخَيْرُ الْجِيرَانِ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ تَعَالَى خَيْرُهُمْ لِجَارِهِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: It is narrated from Abdullah ibn Amr (may Allah be pleased with them) that the Messenger of Allah (peace be upon him) said: 'The best of companions in the sight of Allah is the one who is best to his companion, and the best of neighbors in the sight of Allah is the one who is best to his neighbor.'
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Being good and kind to our neighbors increases our value in the sight of Allah. We should always be well-intentioned and helpful towards them.

seo_meta_aciklama: Authentic hadiths explaining the importance of avoiding backbiting and bad words, and the place and significance of this issue in Islam.
kategori_giris_yazisi:
Backbiting and bad words hold a serious place in Islamic morality and are important matters that Muslims should pay attention to in their relationships with one another. Backbiting is defined as saying something that a person would not like to hear behind their back, and this behavior is strongly condemned in the Quran. Our Prophet (peace be upon him) stated that backbiting and bad words damage the bonds of brotherhood among Muslims and disrupt social peace.

Bad words, on the other hand, are expressions that harm others due to a person's inability to control their tongue. Islam encourages the control of the tongue and the utterance of good words. Our Prophet (peace be upon him) emphasized that the tongue plays an important role in determining whether a person goes to paradise or hell. Therefore, as Muslims, we should control our tongues and avoid bad words.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الآخِرِ فَلْيَقُلْ خَيْرًا أَوْ لِيَصْمُتْ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should speak good or remain silent.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: This hadith emphasizes the importance of controlling our speech and avoiding unnecessary talk.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّ أَحَدَكُمْ لَيَتَكَلَّمُ بِالْكَلِمَةِ مِنْ رِضْوَانِ اللَّهِ مَا يَظُنُّ أَنْ تَبْلُغَ مَا بَلَغَتْ، فَيَكْتُبُ اللَّهُ لَهُ بِهَا رِضْوَانَهُ إِلَى يَوْمِ يَلْقَاهُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: A person speaks a word that pleases Allah without considering where it will lead, and Allah writes His pleasure for them until the Day they meet Him.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Reminds us of the immense value of good words in the sight of Allah.

hadisler.arapca: يَا مَعْشَرَ مَنْ آمَنَ بِلِسَانِهِ وَلَمْ يُؤْمِنْ بِقَلْبِهِ، لَا تَغْتَابُوا الْمُسْلِمِينَ وَلَا تَتَّبِعُوا عَوْرَاتِهِمْ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: O you who believe with your tongues but do not believe with your hearts! Do not backbite Muslims and do not seek their faults.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Indicates that backbiting and seeking the faults of others are incompatible with faith.

hadisler.arapca: الْمُسْلِمُ مَنْ سَلِمَ الْمُسْلِمُونَ مِنْ لِسَانِهِ وَيَدِهِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: A Muslim is one from whom other Muslims are safe from his tongue and hand.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Teaches that a true Muslim should not harm others.

hadisler.arapca: لَا يَدْخُلُ الْجَنَّةَ نَمَّامٌ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: A talebearer will not enter Paradise.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Shows that gossiping is a major sin that can prevent one from entering Paradise.

seo_meta_aciklama: An examination compiled with authentic hadiths on the importance of anger management and forbearance in Islam.
kategori_giris_yazisi: Anger is one of the emotional responses of humans, and if not controlled, it can create negative effects on individuals and society. Islam encourages controlling anger and being patient. Forbearance, which means gentleness and overcoming anger, is a virtue often emphasized by our Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him). In the hadiths, various recommendations are presented to protect oneself from the harms of anger and to adopt forbearance. These hadiths contain important lessons that will help Muslims lead a more peaceful and balanced life in their daily lives.

hadisler.arapca: لَيْسَ الشَّدِيدُ بِالصُّرَعَةِ، إِنَّمَا الشَّدِيدُ الَّذِي يَمْلِكُ نَفْسَهُ عِنْدَ الْغَضَبِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: The strong person is not the one who overcomes others in wrestling, but the one who controls himself in moments of anger.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: True strength lies not in physical power, but in the ability to control oneself during anger.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ كَظَمَ غَيْظًا وَهُوَ قَادِرٌ عَلَى أَنْ يُنَفِّذَهُ، دَعَاهُ اللَّهُ عَلَى رُءُوسِ الْخَلَائِقِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ حَتَّى يُخَيِّرَهُ مِنَ الْحُورِ الْعِينِ مَا شَاءَ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Whoever suppresses his anger while being able to act upon it, Allah will call him on the Day of Resurrection in front of all creatures and let him choose from the houris whatever he wishes.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Great rewards are promised in the Hereafter for those who control their anger.

hadisler.arapca: إِذَا غَضِبَ أَحَدُكُمْ فَلْيَسْكُتْ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: When one of you becomes angry, let him be silent.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Being silent in moments of anger is a way to avoid wrongful words and actions.

hadisler.arapca: إِذَا غَضِبَ أَحَدُكُمْ وَهُوَ قَائِمٌ فَلْيَجْلِسْ، فَإِنْ ذَهَبَ عَنْهُ الْغَضَبُ وَإِلَّا فَلْيَضْطَجِعْ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: If one of you becomes angry while standing, let him sit down; if his anger does not go away, let him lie down.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Changing physical position can help in calming down anger.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الْآخِرِ فَلْيَقُلْ خَيْرًا أَوْ لِيَصْمُتْ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should speak good or remain silent.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Thinking before speaking and saying good words are ways to protect oneself from the harms of anger.

seo_meta_aciklama: A category filled with authentic hadiths explaining the importance of charity and solidarity in Islam.
kategori_giris_yazisi: Charity and solidarity are fundamental cornerstones of the principles of social justice and community solidarity in Islam. These values, which strengthen the bonds of brotherhood among Muslims and ensure social peace, are frequently emphasized in the Qur'an and the hadiths of our Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him). Giving charity is not only about providing material assistance but also serves as a means of spiritual purification and drawing closer to Allah. Islam aims to enhance the welfare of individuals and communities by promoting charity and solidarity. In this context, this selection compiled from the authentic hadiths of our Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him) on the importance of charity and solidarity serves as a guiding reference for Muslims.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّمَا الأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Actions are judged by intentions. Each person will have only what they intended.
hadisler.kaynak: Sahih al-Bukhari, The Beginning of Revelation 1
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: The importance of intention while giving charity is great. Allah evaluates us according to our intentions.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ تَصَدَّقَ بِعَدْلِ تَمْرَةٍ مِنْ كَسْبٍ طَيِّبٍ وَلَا يَقْبَلُ اللَّهُ إِلَّا الطَّيِّبَ فَإِنَّ اللَّهَ يَتَقَبَّلُهَا بِيَمِينِهِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Whoever gives in charity even the equivalent of a date from lawful earnings, Allah accepts it with His right hand.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Charity given from lawful earnings holds great value in the sight of Allah.

hadisler.arapca: السَّاعِي عَلَى الأَرْمَلَةِ وَالْمِسْكِينِ كَالْمُجَاهِدِ فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: The one who strives for the needs of the widow and the poor is like the one who strives in the way of Allah.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Supporting those in need is as valuable as striving in the way of Allah.

hadisler.arapca: مَا نَقَصَتْ صَدَقَةٌ مِنْ مَالٍ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Charity does not decrease wealth.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Charity does not diminish wealth; rather, it increases its blessings.

hadisler.arapca: كُلُّ سُلَامَى مِنَ النَّاسِ عَلَيْهِ صَدَقَةٌ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ تَطْلُعُ فِيهِ الشَّمْسُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Every day the sun rises, a charity is due on every joint of a person.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Every day, one should give charity to express gratitude for the blessings Allah has provided.

kategori: The Value of Time and Life
seo_meta_aciklama: Discover the significance of the concepts of time and life in Islam through authentic hadiths.
kategori_giris_yazisi: In Islam, the value of time and life is considered one of the most precious elements of human existence. Time is one of the greatest blessings that Allah has bestowed upon humanity, and utilizing this blessing correctly is of great importance for a person's happiness in both this world and the Hereafter. Our Prophet (peace be upon him) emphasized in various hadiths that we must recognize the value of time and life, and that we will be held accountable for these blessings. As Muslims, we are obliged to use our time efficiently, to avoid idle and unproductive activities, and to evaluate our lives in accordance with Allah's pleasure. In this context, authentic hadiths remind us of the value of time and life and help us to become more aware of this matter.

hadisler.arapca: نِعْمَتَانِ مَغْبُونٌ فِيهِمَا كَثِيرٌ مِنَ النَّاسِ: الصِّحَّةُ وَالْفَرَاغُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: There are two blessings that many people are deceived by: health and free time.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Health and free time are two great blessings that most people do not appreciate. We should make good use of these blessings.

hadisler.arapca: اغْتَنِمْ خَمْسًا قَبْلَ خَمْسٍ: شَبَابَكَ قَبْلَ هَرَمِكَ، وَصِحَّتَكَ قَبْلَ سَقَمِكَ، وَغِنَاكَ قَبْلَ فَقْرِكَ، وَفَرَاغَكَ قَبْلَ شُغْلِكَ، وَحَيَاتَكَ قَبْلَ مَوْتِكَ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Take advantage of five things before five others: your youth before your old age, your health before your illness, your wealth before your poverty, your free time before your occupation, and your life before your death.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: It is important to seize opportunities in our lives to avoid future regrets. We must use our time wisely.

hadisler.arapca: لَا تَزُولُ قَدَمَا عَبْدٍ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ حَتَّى يُسْأَلَ عَنْ أَرْبَعٍ: عَنْ عُمُرِهِ فِيمَا أَفْنَاهُ، وَعَنْ عِلْمِهِ مَاذَا عَمِلَ فِيهِ، وَعَنْ مَالِهِ مِنْ أَيْنَ اكْتَسَبَهُ وَفِيمَا أَنْفَقَهُ، وَعَنْ جِسْمِهِ فِيمَا أَبْلَاهُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: On the Day of Resurrection, a servant's feet will not move from their place until they are questioned about four things: about their life and how they spent it, about their knowledge and what they did with it, about their wealth and where they earned it and how they spent it, and about their body and how they wore it out.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Every moment of our lives is a matter of accountability before Allah. We must evaluate our time and resources wisely.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّ اللَّهَ تَعَالَى يَقُولُ: يَا ابْنَ آدَمَ، تَفَرَّغْ لِعِبَادَتِي أَمْلَأْ قَلْبَكَ غِنًى وَأَسُدَّ فَقْرَكَ، وَإِلَّا تَفْعَلْ مَلَأْتُ يَدَيْكَ شُغْلًا وَلَمْ أَسُدَّ فَقْرَكَ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Allah the Exalted says: O son of Adam! Allocate time for My worship, and I will fill your heart with richness and alleviate your poverty. Otherwise, I will fill your hands with occupation and will not alleviate your poverty.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Allocating time for worshiping Allah fills our hearts with peace and richness. Worship should be at the center of our lives.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الْآخِرِ فَلْيَقُلْ خَيْرًا أَوْ لِيَصْمُتْ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should speak good or remain silent.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Using our time and speech for good deeds is a manifestation of our faith. We should avoid idle and harmful words.

seo_meta_aciklama: Discover the significance of these values in Islam through authentic Hadiths on gratitude and contentment.
kategori_giris_yazisi: The religion of Islam emphasizes the important role of gratitude and contentment in the lives of believers. Gratitude expresses our thankfulness to Allah, while contentment teaches us to be satisfied with what we have and to find happiness in it. These two values help Muslims lead a peaceful and balanced life in this world. Gratitude and contentment satisfy the heart and lead one to greater blessings. Our Prophet (peace be upon him) has given many recommendations to his community on these matters and has explained the importance of these values through Hadiths.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ لاَ يَشْكُرُ النَّاسَ لاَ يَشْكُرُ اللَّهَ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: He who does not thank people does not thank Allah.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Thanking people is a reflection of our gratitude to Allah.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّ اللَّهَ لاَ يَرْضَى لِلْعَبْدِ الْمُؤْمِنِ إِذَا جَاءَهُ الْخَيْرُ أَنْ يَحْمَدَهُ وَيَشْكُرَهُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Allah loves when a believer is blessed with goodness to praise Him and give thanks.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Thanking Allah when we receive goodness leads us to gain His pleasure.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ أَصْبَحَ مِنْكُمْ آمِنًا فِي سِرْبِهِ مُعَافًى فِي جَسَدِهِ عِنْدَهُ قُوتُ يَوْمِهِ فَكَأَنَّمَا حِيزَتْ لَهُ الدُّنْيَا
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Whoever among you wakes up secure in his home, healthy in his body, and has his daily sustenance, it is as if the whole world has been gathered for him.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Security, health, and sustenance are among the most valuable blessings of the world.

hadisler.arapca: لَيْسَ الْغِنَى عَنْ كَثْرَةِ الْعَرَضِ وَلَكِنَّ الْغِنَى غِنَى النَّفْسِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Wealth is not in the abundance of possessions; rather, true wealth is the richness of the soul.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: True wealth is inner peace and the richness of the heart.

hadisler.arapca: انْظُرُوا إِلَى مَنْ هُوَ أَسْفَلَ مِنْكُمْ وَلَا تَنْظُرُوا إِلَى مَنْ هُوَ فَوْقَكُمْ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Look at those who are below you and do not look at those who are above you.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Contentment teaches us to be happy with what we have and not to envy what others possess.

seo_meta_aciklama: The significance of supplication in Islam and effective methods of supplicating, supported by authentic hadiths.
kategori_giris_yazisi: Supplication is one of the most sincere and direct means of communication between Muslims and Allah. In Islam, supplication is not only a form of worship but also an expression of one's devotion and submission to Allah. It is a moment when the servant expresses their need to their Lord, seeking help and guidance. Our Prophet (peace be upon him) emphasized the importance of supplication and taught Muslims the etiquette of supplicating. Authentic hadiths detail the conditions for the acceptance of supplication, the times and circumstances in which supplication is more virtuous, and other related topics. These hadiths teach Muslims what to pay attention to while supplicating and how their supplications can be more effective.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّ اللَّهَ حَيِيٌّ كَرِيمٌ يَسْتَحْيِي إِذَا رَفَعَ الرَّجُلُ إِلَيْهِ يَدَيْهِ أَنْ يَرُدَّهُمَا صِفْرًا خَائِبَتَيْنِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Allah is shy when a servant raises their hands to Him in supplication, to return them empty.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Allah does not turn away a servant who sincerely supplicates. It is important to be sincere while supplicating.

hadisler.arapca: الدُّعَاءُ هُوَ الْعِبَادَةُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Supplication is the essence of worship.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Supplication is the most fundamental and important part of worship. It is a way to draw closer to Allah.

hadisler.arapca: لَا يَزَالُ يُسْتَجَابُ لِلْعَبْدِ مَا لَمْ يَدْعُ بِإِثْمٍ أَوْ قَطِيعَةِ رَحِمٍ مَا لَمْ يَسْتَعْجِلْ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: The servant's supplication is accepted as long as they do not supplicate with sin or a desire to sever family ties, and as long as they do not rush.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: One should be patient while supplicating and avoid rushing. Supplications that involve sin should be avoided.

hadisler.arapca: إِذَا دَعَا أَحَدُكُمْ فَلْيَعْزِمِ الْمَسْأَلَةَ وَلَا يَقُولَنَّ اللَّهُمَّ إِنْ شِئْتَ فَأَعْطِنِي فَإِنَّهُ لَا مُسْتَكْرِهَ لَهُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: When one of you supplicates, let them be determined in their request and not say, 'O Allah, if You will, then give me,' for there is no force that can compel Allah.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: One should be resolute and definite while supplicating. Expressions that limit Allah's power should be avoided.

hadisler.arapca: إِذَا سَأَلْتَ فَاسْأَلِ اللَّهَ وَإِذَا اسْتَعَنْتَ فَاسْتَعِنْ بِاللَّهِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: When you ask for something, ask Allah, and when you seek help, seek help from Allah.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: In every request and plea for help, one should turn only to Allah. He is the owner of everything.

seo_meta_aciklama: Discover the teachings of Islam on the subject of sickness and healing through authentic hadiths.
kategori_giris_yazisi: Islam places great importance on the topics of sickness and healing. Sicknesses are tests sent by Allah to test His servants and teach them patience. At the same time, illnesses can be a means for the forgiveness of sins. Healing is a blessing and mercy from Allah. Our Prophet (peace be upon him) has given many recommendations to his ummah regarding sickness and healing, teaching methods of supplication and treatment. These hadiths emphasize that Muslims should pay attention to both their spiritual and physical health.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّ اللَّهَ أَنْزَلَ الدَّاءَ وَالدَّوَاءَ وَجَعَلَ لِكُلِّ دَاءٍ دَوَاءً فَتَدَاوَوْا وَلَا تَدَاوَوْا بِحَرَامٍ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Allah has sent down sickness and healing. He has created a cure for every sickness. Therefore, seek treatment, but do not seek treatment through what is haram.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: This hadith teaches that there is a cure for every illness and that one should avoid haram means in the pursuit of treatment.

hadisler.arapca: مَا أَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ دَاءً إِلَّا أَنْزَلَ لَهُ شِفَاءً
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Allah has sent down a cure for every sickness.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: This hadith reminds that Allah has created a cure for every illness and that the ummah should seek this cure.

hadisler.arapca: عَلَيْكُمْ بِالشِّفَاءَيْنِ: الْعَسَلِ وَالْقُرْآنِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Use the two healings: honey and the Quran.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: This hadith recommends honey and the Quran as sources of both physical and spiritual healing.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّ فِي الْحَبَّةِ السَّوْدَاءِ شِفَاءً مِنْ كُلِّ دَاءٍ إِلَّا السَّامَ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: In black seed, there is healing for every disease except death.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: This hadith emphasizes the positive health effects of black seed.

hadisler.arapca: لَا يُصِيبُ الْمُؤْمِنَ مِنْ نَصَبٍ وَلَا وَصَبٍ وَلَا هَمٍّ وَلَا حَزَنٍ وَلَا أَذًى وَلَا غَمٍّ حَتَّى الشَّوْكَةِ يُشَاكُهَا إِلَّا كَفَّرَ اللَّهُ بِهَا مِنْ خَطَايَاهُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: No fatigue, illness, sorrow, grief, pain, or distress befalls a believer, even a prick from a thorn, except that Allah expiates his sins through it.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: This hadith emphasizes that the hardships experienced by a believer can be an expiation for their sins and highlights the importance of patience.

seo_meta_aciklama: Authentic hadiths explaining the importance of marriage and family peace in Islam and the lessons to be drawn from these hadiths.
kategori_giris_yazisi: Marriage holds great significance in the Islamic faith, and the family is considered the fundamental building block of society. Islam promotes a relationship based on love, respect, and compassion between spouses. Our Prophet Muhammad (peace be upon him) has provided many recommendations to his community regarding marriage and family life, and his guidance has helped Muslims maintain a peaceful family life. Family peace is a condition that must be established not only between spouses but also among children and extended family members. Islam contributes to the formation of a peaceful family structure by defining the responsibilities and rights of family members towards one another.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّ مِنْ أَكْمَلِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ إِيمَانًا أَحْسَنُهُمْ خُلُقًا وَأَلْطَفُهُمْ بِأَهْلِهِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: The most complete of the believers in faith is the one who has the best character and is the most kind to his family.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Good morals and kind behavior within the family contribute to the perfection of our faith.

hadisler.arapca: خَيْرُكُمْ خَيْرُكُمْ لِأَهْلِهِ وَأَنَا خَيْرُكُمْ لِأَهْلِي
hadisler.turkce_anlam: The best of you is the one who is best to his family. I am the best of you to my family.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Being good to the family is a sign that a person is a righteous Muslim.

hadisler.arapca: إِذَا أَنْفَقَ الرَّجُلُ عَلَى أَهْلِهِ نَفَقَةً وَهُوَ يَحْتَسِبُهَا كَانَتْ لَهُ صَدَقَةً
hadisler.turkce_anlam: When a man spends on his family with the intention of seeking Allah's pleasure, that spending is considered charity for him.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Expenses made for the family, when done for the sake of Allah, earn the reward of charity.

hadisler.arapca: مَا أَكَلَ أَحَدٌ طَعَامًا قَطُّ خَيْرًا مِنْ أَنْ يَأْكُلَ مِنْ عَمَلِ يَدِهِ وَإِنَّ نَبِيَّ اللَّهِ دَاوُدَ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَام كَانَ يَأْكُلُ مِنْ عَمَلِ يَدِهِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: No one has ever eaten a better food than that which is earned by his own hand. The Prophet of Allah, David (peace be upon him), also ate from the work of his own hands.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Earning our sustenance through our own efforts is the best way to provide halal food for our family.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّ الرَّجُلَ إِذَا سَقَى امْرَأَتَهُ مِنَ الْمَاءِ أُجِرَ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: A man earns reward even when he gives his wife a drink of water.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Even small acts of kindness between spouses can lead to great rewards in the sight of Allah.

seo_meta_aciklama: The authentic hadiths on the rights of orphans and compassion emphasize the importance of being merciful towards orphans in Islam.
kategori_giris_yazisi: The Islamic faith encourages being merciful and just towards orphans. Protecting the rights of orphans, showing them love and compassion is essential for societal peace and earning Allah's pleasure. Our Prophet (peace be upon him) stated that treating orphans well and respecting their rights would lead to entering Paradise. The protection and care of orphans is one of the fundamental values of the Islamic community, and there are many authentic hadiths on this matter. These hadiths remind Muslims of their responsibilities towards orphans and encourage them in this regard.

hadisler.arapca: أَنَا وَكَافِلُ الْيَتِيمِ فِي الْجَنَّةِ هَكَذَا - وَأَشَارَ بِالسَّبَّابَةِ وَالْوُسْطَى وَفَرَّجَ بَيْنَهُمَا قَلِيلًا
hadisler.turkce_anlam: I and the one who takes care of an orphan will be like this in Paradise - he indicated with his index and middle fingers and slightly separated them.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: The one who takes care of orphans will be in close proximity to our Prophet in Paradise.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ مَسَحَ رَأْسَ يَتِيمٍ لَمْ يَمْسَحْهُ إِلَّا لِلَّهِ كَانَ لَهُ بِكُلِّ شَعْرَةٍ مَرَّتْ عَلَيْهَا يَدُهُ حَسَنَةٌ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Whoever strokes the head of an orphan for the sake of Allah, for every hair that his hand touches, he will earn a good deed.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Showing love to orphans leads to great rewards in the sight of Allah.

hadisler.arapca: خَيْرُ بَيْتٍ فِي الْمُسْلِمِينَ بَيْتٌ فِيهِ يَتِيمٌ يُحْسَنُ إِلَيْهِ وَشَرُّ بَيْتٍ فِي الْمُسْلِمِينَ بَيْتٌ فِيهِ يَتِيمٌ يُسَاءُ إِلَيْهِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: The best house among Muslims is the house where an orphan is treated well. The worst house is the one where an orphan is treated poorly.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Treating orphans well makes a house the best in the sight of Allah.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَأْكُلُونَ أَمْوَالَ الْيَتَامَى ظُلْمًا إِنَّمَا يَأْكُلُونَ فِي بُطُونِهِمْ نَارًا وَسَيَصْلَوْنَ سَعِيرًا
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Indeed, those who consume the wealth of orphans unjustly are only filling their bellies with fire, and they will enter a blazing fire.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Unjustly taking the property of orphans is a great sin and leads to punishment in the Hereafter.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ ضَمَّ يَتِيمًا بَيْنَ مُسْلِمِينَ فِي طَعَامِهِ وَشَرَابِهِ حَتَّى يُغْنِيَهُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَجَلَّ أَوْجَبَ اللَّهُ لَهُ الْجَنَّةَ إِلَّا أَنْ يَعْمَلَ ذَنْبًا لَا يُغْفَرُ لَهُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Whoever shelters an orphan among Muslims in his food and drink until Allah enriches him, Allah makes Paradise obligatory for him, unless he commits an unforgivable sin.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Caring for orphans is one of the ways to attain Paradise.

seo_meta_aciklama: A compilation filled with authentic hadiths about the importance and virtue of seeking knowledge in Islam.
kategori_giris_yazisi: Islam places great importance on seeking knowledge. Knowledge liberates a person from ignorance and shows them the right path. Our Prophet (peace be upon him) stated that seeking knowledge is obligatory for every Muslim man and woman. Knowledge benefits a person not only in this worldly life but also in the Hereafter. Islamic scholars have expressed that knowledge brings a person closer to Allah and strengthens one's faith. Seeking knowledge enables a person to benefit both themselves and society. Therefore, seeking knowledge in Islam is considered one of the most virtuous acts of worship.

hadisler.arapca: طَلَبُ الْعِلْمِ فَرِيضَةٌ عَلَى كُلِّ مُسْلِمٍ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Seeking knowledge is obligatory for every Muslim man and woman.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Seeking knowledge is the responsibility of every Muslim, and it enlightens their religious and worldly life.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ سَلَكَ طَرِيقًا يَلْتَمِسُ فِيهِ عِلْمًا سَهَّلَ اللَّهُ لَهُ بِهِ طَرِيقًا إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Whoever embarks on a path to seek knowledge, Allah will make the path to Paradise easy for them.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Striving on the path of knowledge leads a person to attain happiness in the Hereafter.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّ الْعُلَمَاءَ وَرَثَةُ الْأَنْبِيَاءِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Scholars are the inheritors of the prophets.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Scholars carry the intellectual legacy left by the prophets and enlighten societies.

hadisler.arapca: خَيْرُكُمْ مَنْ تَعَلَّمَ الْقُرْآنَ وَعَلَّمَهُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: The best among you are those who learn the Quran and teach it.
hadisler.kaynak: Sahih Bukhari, The Virtues of the Quran 21
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Knowledge of the Quran is the highest form of knowledge, and learning and teaching it is a great virtue.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّ اللَّهَ لَا يَقْبِضُ الْعِلْمَ انْتِزَاعًا يَنْتَزِعُهُ مِنَ النَّاسِ وَلَكِنْ يَقْبِضُ الْعِلْمَ بِقَبْضِ الْعُلَمَاءِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Allah does not take knowledge away from the hearts of people by snatching it; rather, He takes knowledge by the death of scholars.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: The value of scholars is immense in terms of the continuity of knowledge; their loss leads to a decrease in knowledge.

seo_meta_aciklama: A compilation filled with authentic hadiths explaining the importance of patience and trust in Allah in Islam.
kategori_giris_yazisi: Patience and trust in Allah are among the fundamental virtues of Islam, expressing the believers' confidence and submission to Allah. Patience involves being steadfast in the face of difficulties and accepting Allah's decree, while trust in Allah means leaving the outcome to Him after making every effort. These two concepts enable believers to cope with the hardships they encounter in this world and attain happiness in the Hereafter. Islamic scholars have stated that patience and trust in Allah are profound indicators of faith that should take root in the hearts of believers. In this context, authentic hadiths teach us the importance of patience and trust in Allah and how these virtues should be practiced.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّمَا الصَّبْرُ عِنْدَ الصَّدْمَةِ الأُولَى
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Patience is only shown at the first shock.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: True patience is the reaction shown at the first moment of an event. Believers should remain steadfast in the face of sudden occurrences.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ يَتَصَبَّرْ يُصَبِّرْهُ اللَّهُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Whoever strives to be patient, Allah will grant him patience.
hadisler.kaynak: Sahih al-Bukhari, The Book of Softening 20
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Patience can be attained through effort, and Allah does not leave this effort unrewarded.

hadisler.arapca: وَمَنْ يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Whoever puts their trust in Allah, He is sufficient for them.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Whoever trusts in Allah does not need anything else. Trust in Allah attracts His help.

hadisler.arapca: عَجَبًا لأَمْرِ المُؤْمِنِ، إِنَّ أَمْرَهُ كُلَّهُ خَيْرٌ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: How astonishing is the affair of the believer! All of his affairs are good.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: The believer finds goodness in every situation they encounter; for they turn every circumstance in their favor with patience and gratitude.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّ اللَّهَ مَعَ الصَّابِرِينَ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Indeed, Allah is with the patient.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Allah assists His patient servants and never leaves them alone.

seo_meta_aciklama: Discover the teachings of Islam on good morals and etiquette through authentic hadiths.
kategori_giris_yazisi:
Good morals and etiquette are among the cornerstones of Islam, serving as an important principle that guides Muslims in their daily lives. Islam encourages individuals to act with good morals and etiquette while fulfilling their responsibilities towards both Allah and other people. This is not only an individual virtue but also plays a critical role in ensuring social peace and harmony.

Our Prophet (peace be upon him) has guided Muslims in this regard, exemplifying the best of good morals and encouraging them to embody these qualities. The importance of good morals and etiquette is frequently emphasized in the hadiths, highlighting how essential these virtues are for happiness in both this world and the Hereafter. These hadiths serve as a guide for Muslims to direct their lives and strengthen their moral values.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّمَا بُعِثْتُ لِأُتَمِّمَ صَالِحَ الأَخْلاَقِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: I was only sent to perfect good character.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Our Prophet (peace be upon him) stated that his purpose of being sent was to perfect good character. This emphasizes the importance of morals in Islam.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الآخِرِ فَلْيَقُلْ خَيْرًا أَوْ لِيَصْمُتْ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: Whoever believes in Allah and the Last Day should speak good or remain silent.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: We should be careful with our words, either speaking good or remaining silent. This shows the importance of controlling our tongue.

hadisler.arapca: إِنَّ مِنْ خِيَارِكُمْ أَحْسَنَكُمْ أَخْلاَقًا
hadisler.turkce_anlam: The best among you are those with the best character.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Good morals are the most valuable trait of a Muslim. Beautifying our character increases our worth in the sight of Allah.

hadisler.arapca: لَيْسَ الشَّدِيدُ بِالصُّرَعَةِ، إِنَّمَا الشَّدِيدُ الَّذِي يَمْلِكُ نَفْسَهُ عِنْدَ الْغَضَبِ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: The strong is not the one who overcomes others in wrestling; rather, the strong is the one who controls himself when angry.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Being able to control ourselves in moments of anger is a sign of true strength and good morals.

hadisler.arapca: مَنْ لَا يَرْحَمُ النَّاسَ لَا يَرْحَمُهُ اللَّهُ
hadisler.turkce_anlam: He who does not show mercy to people will not be shown mercy by Allah.
hadisler.kisa_aciklama: Mercy is one of the cornerstones of good morals. When we show mercy to others, we attain Allah's mercy.
